ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Paradise
ships.notes: In service. Sails from Port of Palm Beach to Key West and The Bahamas. Official about-us page: "Launched in May 2022 with the Margaritaville at Sea Paradise sailing from the Port of Palm Beach." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.

ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Islander
ships.notes: In service. Official about-us page: "expanded in June 2024 with the addition of the Margaritaville at Sea Islander, offering cruises from Port Tampa Bay." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.
